notes: EMI calculator enhancements. (1) Added an explicit Calculate button (live recompute still works on every input; the button forces a recompute and makes the flow feel deliberate). (2) New annual EMI step-up what-if: raise the EMI by X% on each anniversary of a chosen month — model a rising-EMI payoff. (3) All dates are now calendar Month-Year: the lump-sum prepayment month and step-up month use month pickers, the result headline shows the actual close month ('Closes by Dec 2027') instead of a raw count, and the amortization table's first column shows each row's Month-Year. The simulation engine was rewritten to walk calendar months (YYYY-MM) and supports the annual step-up plus lump-by-month. Apply-to-projection now also writes annual step-up events (a setAmount on each anniversary) alongside the new EMI and the close event; restore still removes only calculator-applied (source:'emiCalc') events. Verified: 8,90,134 @ 8.25% → 52k flat = 19 months / Dec 2027 / 60,175 interest; +5% annual step-up from 2027-06 = 18 months / 59,807; +3L lump = ~12 months.
